allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; img=Image.open\('public/assets/tall-grass.png'\); print\(img.size, img.mode\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content src/managers/PlatformManager.ts -Raw\) -replace 'Lv\\.','Nv.' | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 src/managers/PlatformManager.ts; \(Get-Content src/scenes/TeamOrderScene.ts -Raw\) -replace 'Lv\\.','Nv.' | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 src/scenes/TeamOrderScene.ts; \(Get-Content src/scenes/BattleScene.ts -Raw\) -replace 'Lv\\.','Nv.' | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 src/scenes/BattleScene.ts; \(Get-Content src/scenes/BagScene.ts -Raw\) -replace 'Lv\\.','Nv.' | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 src/scenes/BagScene.ts; \(Get-Content src/scenes/GameScene.ts -Raw\) -replace 'Lv\\.','Nv.' | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 src/scenes/GameScene.ts")

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3003/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($response.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "✓ Servidor activo en http://localhost:3003/" } else { "✗ Error: $\($response.StatusCode\)" })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3005 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($response.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✓ Servidor Vite corriendo en puerto 3005" } else { Write-Host "✗ Servidor no responde" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.SendKeys]::SendWait\('^{TAB}'\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\); $graphics.CopyFromScreen\(0, 0, 0, 0, $bitmap.Size\); $bitmap.Save\('C:\\temp\\pokedex-screenshot.png'\); Write-Host "Screenshot guardado")

PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path 'C:\\temp'\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'C:\\temp' -Force | Out-Null }; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\); $graphics.CopyFromScreen\(0, 0, 0, 0, $bitmap.Size\); $bitmap.Save\('C:\\temp\\pokedex.png'\); $graphics.Dispose\(\); $bitmap.Dispose\(\); Write-Host "✓ Captura guardada en C:\\temp\\pokedex.png")
